calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-17-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. JUdge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Patricia Dowling. Petitioner Yuliya Golster was sworn and examined. The Court grants decree changing petitioner's name to Yuliya Magomedov. Decree signed in open court.
